# ADR-NNNN: Short decision title

> File name: `docs/decisions/NNNN-title-with-dashes.md` — zero-padded 4-digit sequence, lowercase, dashed.
> Keep ADRs short (a page or two). Link out to supporting detail rather than inlining it.

## Context

What problem, force, or constraint requires a decision? Why now?

- Driver 2
- Driver 3

## Considered Options

2. Option B
3. Option C

## Decision

Chosen option:

Why:

Good:

## Confirmation

How will we know this decision is working? What signal would tell us to revisit?
